---
title: "Sean Conway"
image: conway_photo.jpeg
links: 
  - icon: linkedin
    text: LinkedIn
    href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sean-conway-a1b7b0326
  - icon: github
    text: Github
    href: https://github.com/sp-conway
---

![](conway_photo.jpeg){width="400"}

Hello! Thank you for stopping by. I am a Post-Doctoral Researcher in Psychology at Purdue University. Click my About Me page to learn more about my background and experience.
